title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices for protecting data from cyber threats. The lecture is part of Harvard University's CS50 program and is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
